hooks.command: cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && if ! find src/ -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30

cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && if ! find src/ -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; echo '{"event":"plan_accepted","action":"run_command","command":"/jarvis-plan-revisor"}'

cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && if ! find src/ -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; if git diff --stat -- src/ public/ test/ prisma/ migrations/ package.json tsconfig.json '*.config.*' 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo '{"event":"stop_with_changes","action":"run_command","command":"/jarvis-test-flow"}'; fi
